commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3ea27df7e005ef3778d61f6e8d037f8a1e5499e3)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the opencode-go Kimi stream wrapper to recursively remove reasoning fields from root payloads, message/input arrays, and nested content, and adds a new stream test file for those cases.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main has a root-only opencode-go Kimi wrapper while the completions replay path can preserve Kimi `reasoning_content` in assistant messages. I did not run a live OpenCode Go provider call, so this is source-reproducible rather than live-reproduced.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied real OpenCode Go Kimi proof and a maintainer check that tests exercise the production wrapper; automation cannot provide the contributor's real environment proof.

target.title: fix(opencode-go): strip reasoning fields from messages for Kimi models (#83812)
target.body:
## Summary

Kimi K2.5/K2.6 models reject reasoning_details, reasoning_content, reasoning, and reasoning_text fields in request payloads, causing 400 errors:

```
LLM request failed: provider rejected the request schema or tool payload.
400 Error from provider: Extra inputs are not permitted, field: messages[5].reasoning_details
```

## Root Cause

The existing stripReasoningParams() function only deleted root-level reasoning fields, but did not strip reasoning fields inside messages[] or nested content[] arrays.

## Fix

Enhanced stripReasoningParams() to recursively strip reasoning fields from:
- Root payload level: reasoning, reasoning_effort, reasoningEffort, include
- messages[] array
- input[] array (alternative message container)
- Nested content[] arrays within messages

## Test Coverage

Added 9 comprehensive test cases in extensions/opencode-go/stream.test.ts.

## Files Changed

- extensions/opencode-go/stream.ts: Added stripReasoningFieldsFromMessage() helper and enhanced stripReasoningParams()
- extensions/opencode-go/stream.test.ts: New test file with 9 test cases

Fixes #83812
